name: Langha
desc: Grace meets elegance in this stunning pastel pink designer lehenga, crafted for weddings, receptions, engagements, and festive celebrations. The outfit features intricate embroidery with delicate sequins and zari work that creates a luxurious, timeless look.  The beautifully embellished blouse is paired with a flowy flared lehenga and a matching soft net dupatta finished with a rich embroidered border. A stylish embroidered waist belt enhances the silhouette, while the matching embellished potli bag completes the ensemble with a sophisticated touch.  Designed to offer both comfort and glamour, this lehenga is perfect for bridesmaids, wedding guests, engagement ceremonies, sangeet, mehendi, and festive occasions.
